data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: The design prioritizes speed and accessibility, optimizing for average user efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Interface elements sized and placed for quick and easy use.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies menu choices to reduce decision-making time.
data.technical_spec: Minimized menu item options and categorized navigation flows.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Aligns with user expectations from other Microsoft suite products for smooth transitions.
data.technical_spec: Consistent design language with a familiar user interface and layout.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Related items are grouped to facilitate easy interpretation and flow.
data.technical_spec: Logical structuring of information and grouping of related content.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Aims to streamline information to enhance user cognitive load handling.
data.technical_spec: Presenting information in digestible chunks with supportive hierarchies.
